zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Furneaux於大約1302年出生在英國薩默塞特阿生頓時，她的父親Sir Matthew Furneaux40歲，母親Maud Raleigh33歲。她於大約1323年與Hugh Longland在英國薩默塞特阿生頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年8月8日在英國薩默塞特易亞斯特 布倫特享年48歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特易亞斯特 布倫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Furneaux于大约1302年出生在英国薩默塞特阿生頓时，她的父亲Sir Matthew Furneaux40岁，母亲Maud Raleigh33岁。她于大约1323年与Hugh Longland在英国薩默塞特阿生頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年8月8日在英国薩默塞特易亞斯特 布倫特享年48岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特易亞斯特 布倫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Furneaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in Normandy called Fourneaux ‘(the) furnaces’, one in Manche, the other in Calvados. Compare   Furnace   and   Furnell  .

variants.name: Furney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Furneaux  . It may sometimes have been confused with   Furness  ; the two names have variants in common (see   Furnace  ).

variants.name: Fornell
meanings: English: variant of Furneaux , or a nickname from Middle English fornel ‘small oven or furnace’.

variants.name: Furnace
meanings: (of Norman origin): sometimes a variant of   Furneaux  .

variants.name: Furnell
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a variant of   Farnell  . Compare   Funnell  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Furneaux was born about 1302, in Ashington, Somerset, England, her father, Sir Matthew Furneaux, was 40 and her mother, Maud Raleigh, was 33. She married Hugh Longland about 1323, in Ashington, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 8 August 1349, in East Brent, Somerset, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in East Brent, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Furneaux est née environ 1302, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Matthew Furneaux, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud Raleigh, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Longland environ 1323, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1349, à East Brent, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à East Brent, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Furneaux um 1302 in Ashington, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Matthew Furneaux 40 und ihre Mutter Maud Raleigh 33. Sie hat um 1323 in Ashington, Somerset, England Hugh Longland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. August 1349 im Alter von 48 Jahren in East Brent, Somerset, England und wurde in East Brent, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Furneaux è nata il circa 1302 nel Ashington, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir Matthew Furneaux, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Maud Raleigh, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Longland circa 1323, nel Ashington, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 8 agosto 1349, nel East Brent, Somerset, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a East Brent, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Furneauxが約1302年にイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Matthew Furneauxは40歳，母Maud Raleighは33歳であった。約1323年にイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンでHugh Longlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年8月8日にイギリスソメルセトエアスト ブレントで48歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトエアスト ブレントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Furneaux(이)가 대략 1302년 영국 서머세트 애신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Matthew Furneaux(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Raleigh(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1323년 영국 서머세트 애신그턴에서 Hugh Longland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 8월 8일 영국 서머세트 이스트 브렌트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 이스트 브렌트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Furneaux nasceu aproximadamente 1302, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Matthew Furneaux, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maud Raleigh, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Longland aproximadamente 1323, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1349, em East Brent, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em East Brent, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Furneaux родилась около 1302 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Matthew Furneaux было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Raleigh, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Longland около 1323 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 августа 1349 г. в местности эаст брент, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст брент, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Furneaux nació aproximadamente 1302, en Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Matthew Furneaux, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Maud Raleigh, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Hugh Longland aproximadamente 1323, en Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1349, en East Brent, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en East Brent, Somerset, Inglaterra.
